Frequently asked questions

What is AlignAI?

AlignAI is an AI intelligence platform for small businesses. We score AI tools, curate field-tested prompts, and share insights to help SMBs find, trust, and use AI without a CTO. Everything is powered by real community data — 22,000+ user reviews, 5,400+ tools scored, and 296 prompt variants across Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Copilot. No vendor marketing. No affiliate partnerships.

How does AlignAI score AI tools?

AlignAI uses a proprietary 5-Layer Community Intelligence system — not simple star ratings. Our NLP engine analyzes every review for specificity, business context, implementation depth, and sentiment. Reviews are weighted by source credibility, recency, and detail — a 6-month production review counts far more than a vague launch-day comment. The result is a score from 0 to 100 with a community verdict: WORKED (75+), MIXED (50–74), or FAILED (below 50), plus a confidence band. Zero affiliate links. Zero sponsored placements.

Are AI tool review sites trustworthy?

Most aren't. The majority of AI tool review sites are funded by affiliate commissions or sponsored placements — the tools ranked highest are often the ones that pay the most, not the ones that work best. AlignAI was built to solve this by scoring tools exclusively on real community feedback with full methodology transparency.

What's the best AI tool for my small business?

It depends on your business type, team size, and specific needs. AlignAI scores 5,437+ tools across 27 categories so you can find the right fit based on what real users in similar businesses actually experienced.

Is AlignAI free?

Yes. Both Browse AI Tools (app.alignai.business) and Prompt Hub (prompts.alignai.business) are free to use during our launch period. Browse scored tools, read community verdicts, search by category, compare tools, save to your stack, and copy any of 296 model-specific prompt variants — all at no cost.

How is AlignAI different from G2 or Capterra?

G2 and Capterra are review sites for enterprise software with affiliate revenue models. AlignAI is an AI intelligence platform built specifically for small businesses — we score AI tools, curate prompts, and share insights using real community data from Reddit, Hacker News, Product Hunt, Indie Hackers, and AlternativeTo. Zero affiliate links. Zero sponsored placements. Our scoring uses a proprietary 5-Layer Community Intelligence system with full methodology transparency — not vendor-submitted reviews.

Who is AlignAI built for?

AlignAI is built for small business owners, solopreneurs, and lean teams navigating AI without a CTO. Whether you're choosing an AI tool, copying a field-tested prompt, or acting on community insights, everything is filtered for small-business context — so you see what works at 1–50 people, not at Fortune 500 scale.

How often are AI tool scores updated?

Tool scores are recomputed continuously as new community reviews arrive, and the homepage stats and top-rated list rebuild daily. When an AI tool ships a major update, model change, or pricing change, we flag affected reviews and re-weight them — so the score reflects the current version of the tool, not the version reviewed 18 months ago.

Can I submit a review for an AI tool?

Yes. Community reviews are the foundation of every score. Any verified small-business user can submit a review, describe their use case and team size, and tag the outcome as WORKED, MIXED or FAILED. Detailed reviews with business context and implementation depth are weighted more heavily than short one-liners.

Does AlignAI take affiliate commissions or sponsored placements?

No. AlignAI has zero affiliate links and zero sponsored placements. Vendors cannot pay to appear, pay to rank higher, or pay to remove reviews. The scoring methodology is public and audit-friendly. This is the core product promise: they rank who pays, we score what works.

Stay in the loop.

Get a weekly digest of top-scored tools and new community reviews. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.

You're in! We'll be in touch soon.

Not sure where to start? Browse 385+ scored tools or search by category to find what works for your business.
